title: Oliwier's Bulbs 10 x Ranunculus Asiaticus Purple Beautiful Spring Summer Flowering Bulbs Persian Buttercup Cut Flowers Hardy Garden Perennial Ready To Plant Corms Size 5/6
features: Nothing beats Ranunculus flowers to add that dash of whimsy and romance to the garden. These rare ranunculus corms will produce unique purple blooms that not only look lovely, but combine beautifully with so many other plants, flower bulbs and perennials. Excellent cut flowers.
Also known as the Persian buttercup these pretty purple Ranunculus have fully double flowers with tightly clustered petals

Ranunculus are ground-hardy in warmer areas and can be planted in the autumn between September and November for flowers in early spring or in the spring when the danger of frost has passed, usually between March and May for flowers in late summer

It is essential to soak corms in water overnight prior to planting. As the corms soak, they will plump up, often doubling in size. Ranunculus corms have pointed ends that look a lot like claws. Make sure these “claw-ends” are facing down as you plant them
Each stem produces one to several flowers. They will grow equally well in full sun or partial shade. You will receive pack of 10 quality bulbs, size 5/6
Expected blooming period: Spring to Summer
description: Ranunculus Asiaticus Purple - Pack of 10 bulbs. Nothing beats Ranunculus flowers to add that dash of whimsy and romance to the garden. These rare ranunculus corms will produce unique purple blooms that not only look lovely, but combine beautifully with so many other plants, flower bulbs and perennials. Excellent cut flowers. Also known as the Persian buttercup these pretty purple Ranunculus have fully double flowers with tightly clustered petals. Each stem produces one to several flowers.. They will grow equally well in full sun or partial shade. Ranunculus are ground-hardy in warmer areas and can be planted in the autumn between September and December for flowers in early spring or in the spring when the danger of frost has passed, usually between March and May for flowers in late summer. Blooms: June - July Flower colour: pale pink petals with darker edges. Full grown height: 25 - 40 cm. Plant location: sunny Prefers Well Drained Soil and a Sunny position NOTE: it is essential to soak corms in water overnight prior to planting. As the corms soak, they will plump up, often doubling in size. Ranunculus corms have pointed ends that look a lot like claws. Make sure these “claw-ends” are facing down as you plant them You will receive pack of 10 quality bulbs, size 5/6 in eco-friendly recyclable packaging with detailed instructions included
